languages.text: {n}Воздух полнится удушливо-пряным запахом спор. Перед вами возвышается скромный саркофаг. У его основания сидит иссохшее тело в одеяниях, украшенных инсигнией.{/n}
{n}The air is suffocatingly thick with the spicy scent of spores. A modest-looking sarcophagus stands before you. At its base rests a desiccated corpse, clad in robes bearing an insignia.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Воздух полнится удушливо-пряным запахом спор. Перед вами возвышается скромный саркофаг. У его основания сидит иссохшее тело в одеяниях, украшенных инсигнией.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The air is thick with the suffocating, spicy scent of spores. A modest looking sarcophagus towers before you. At its foot rests a parched corpse, clad in robes bearing the insignia.{/n}
{n}The air is thick with the suffocating, spicy scent of spores. A modest looking sarcophagus towers before you. At its foot rests a parched corpse, clad in robes bearing the insignia.{/n}
{n}The air is suffocatingly thick with the spicy scent of spores. A modest-looking sarcophagus stands before you. At its base rests a desiccated corpse, clad in robes bearing an insignia.{/n}
{n}The air is suffocatingly thick with the spicy scent of spores. A modest-looking sarcophagus stands before you. At its base rests a desiccated corpse, clad in robes bearing an insignia.{/n}

languages.text: {n}空气中弥漫着浓烈得令人窒息的刺鼻孢子味。一具外观朴素的石棺立在你面前。石棺底部躺着一具干瘪的尸体，身上的长袍还带着徽章。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The air is suffocatingly thick with the spicy scent of spores. A modest-looking sarcophagus stands before you. At its base rests a desiccated corpse, clad in robes bearing an insignia.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}空气中弥漫着浓烈得令人窒息的刺鼻孢子味。一具外观朴素的石棺立在你面前。石棺底部躺着一具干瘪的尸体，身上的长袍还带着徽章。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Hava, sporların acı kokusuyla boğucu derecede ağırlaşıyor. Önünde mütevazı görünümlü bir lahit duruyor. Dibindeyse üzerinde nişan bulunan cübbeler giymiş, kurumuş bir ceset yatıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The air is suffocatingly thick with the spicy scent of spores. A modest-looking sarcophagus stands before you. At its base rests a desiccated corpse, clad in robes bearing an insignia.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Hava, sporların acı kokusuyla boğucu derecede ağırlaşıyor. Önünde mütevazı görünümlü bir lahit duruyor. Dibindeyse üzerinde nişan bulunan cübbeler giymiş, kurumuş bir ceset yatıyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Dans l'air saturé de l'odeur aigre et suffocante des spores, un sarcophage à l'allure modeste se dresse devant vous. À son pied gît un cadavre desséché, vêtu d'une robe ornée d'un insigne.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The air is suffocatingly thick with the spicy scent of spores. A modest-looking sarcophagus stands before you. At its base rests a desiccated corpse, clad in robes bearing an insignia.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Dans l'air saturé de l'odeur aigre et suffocante des spores, un sarcophage à l'allure modeste se dresse devant vous. À son pied gît un cadavre desséché, vêtu d'une robe ornée d'un insigne.{/n}

languages.text: {n}El aire es sorprendentemente espeso y tiene el olor picante de las esporas. Tienes delante un modesto sarcófago. A sus pies hay un cadáver disecado, ataviado con una túnica que lleva una insignia.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The air is suffocatingly thick with the spicy scent of spores. A modest-looking sarcophagus stands before you. At its base rests a desiccated corpse, clad in robes bearing an insignia.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}El aire es sorprendentemente espeso y tiene el olor picante de las esporas. Tienes delante un modesto sarcófago. A sus pies hay un cadáver disecado, ataviado con una túnica que lleva una insignia.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Die drückende Luft ist vom würzigen Duft von Sporen erfüllt. Vor dir steht ein bescheidener Sarcophagus. An seinem Sockel lehnt eine verdorrte, in Roben gehüllte Leiche.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The air is suffocatingly thick with the spicy scent of spores. A modest-looking sarcophagus stands before you. At its base rests a desiccated corpse, clad in robes bearing an insignia.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Die drückende Luft ist vom würzigen Duft von Sporen erfüllt. Vor dir steht ein bescheidener Sarcophagus. An seinem Sockel lehnt eine verdorrte, in Roben gehüllte Leiche.{/n}

languages.text: {n}空気は、香辛料めいた胞子の匂いで、息が詰まるほど濃密だ。質素な見た目の石棺が、あなたの前に立っている。その台座には、紋章を帯びた衣をまとった、干からびた死体が横たわっている。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The air is suffocatingly thick with the spicy scent of spores. A modest-looking sarcophagus stands before you. At its base rests a desiccated corpse, clad in robes bearing an insignia.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}空気は、香辛料めいた胞子の匂いで、息が詰まるほど濃密だ。質素な見た目の石棺が、あなたの前に立っている。その台座には、紋章を帯びた衣をまとった、干からびた死体が横たわっている。{/n}
